name: super-mario
description: Jeff Ryan's Super Mario: How Nintendo Conquered America — the story of innovation, persistence, and great design behind Nintendo's rise from playing cards to global entertainment dominance.
useCase: Innovation under pressure, power of great design, surviving crisis, building a brand, Japanese business culture, entering a broken market.
knownRisks: The book is a popular history, not a business strategy manual
Some details about Nintendo's internal decisions may be simplified
The story reflects a specific era and market — not all lessons may apply today
